prefixes.boundedContext: conversation messages, realtime delivery, presence, routing, RTC signaling, IM projections, IM notifications, IM automation, and IM stream frames
notes: Use im_ only for instant-messaging-owned tables.
Do not rename unrelated IAM, Drive, integration, ops, or platform tables to im_.
Desktop SQLite tables that materialize IM state must use the same im_ logical table names.

nonImPrefixPolicy.description: Tables outside the instant messaging bounded context keep their own business-domain prefix or existing approved legacy name. The im_ prefix is not a product-wide default.
